purpose: Prove IAMScope does not overclaim validated admin reachability when AssumeRole permission is structurally present but gated by a permission-side condition it cannot prove satisfied.
claim_surface: IAMScope can retain the exact AssumeRole permission and trust structure for Env14 while preserving permission-side condition evidence.
IAMScope does not emit a validated admin reachability claim for the Env14 alice->admin path.
IAMScope can surface the Env14 permission condition structurally enough for machine scoring without pretending runtime condition satisfaction.
benchmark_proves: For the Env14 alice->admin path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole permission edge.
For the Env14 alice->admin path, the permission edge carries aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent condition evidence.
For the Env14 alice->admin path, scenario.json contains the expected clean sts:AssumeRole trust edge.
For the same path, IAMScope emits zero validated admin_reachability findings.
For the same path, IAMScope emits at least one inconclusive admin_reachability finding.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove runtime MFA satisfaction checking.
It does not prove broader permission-condition handling beyond this narrow identity-policy AssumeRole case.
It does not prove cross-account or SCP-mediated condition behavior.
unknowns_remaining: How richer permission-condition operators behave remains unknown here.
Whether other reasoner families should expose permission-condition evidence differently remains unknown here.

environment.notes: Single-account IAM-only assume-role path to an admin-equivalent role gated by MFA on the caller-side identity policy.

ground_truth.reason: Alice's identity-policy Allow for sts:AssumeRole requires aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent=true. IAMScope preserves that condition but does not prove runtime MFA context.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env14 alice->admin permission edge exists structurally.
The permission edge carries aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent condition evidence.
The exact Env14 alice->admin trust edge exists structurally.
The exact Env14 alice->admin path is not falsely emitted as validated admin reachability.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope can demote or hold uncertain a permission-conditioned admin path instead of overclaiming it as validated.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader permission-condition coverage remains only implied.
